subject: Swift-BAT trigger 221873 is not a GRB or a Transient
body:
S. D. Barthelmy (GSFC), C. Markwardt (GSFC/UMD), D. Palmer (LANL),
T. Sakamoto (GSFC/ORAU)
on behalf of the Swift-BAT team:

The Swift-BAT trigger (trigger=221873) at 16:03:58 UT on 30 July 2006
is not due to a hard x-ray transient or a GRB.  It is not anything
astrophysical.
